## GitClaw Agents Catalog Report

This catalog maps GitClaw's agent surface inspired by OpenClaw agent files and Hermes profiles/delegation boundaries: it exposes commands, layers, and gates while keeping agent policy/spec bodies, issue/comment bodies, prompts, tool outputs, credentials, channel payloads, and session bodies out of the report.

### Catalog Entries
- command=`catalog` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /agents catalog` local_command=`gitclaw agents catalog` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`body-free-output` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`list` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /agents` local_command=`gitclaw agents list` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`body-free-agent-envelope` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`verify` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /agents verify` local_command=`gitclaw agents verify` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`policy-spec-validation` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`risk` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /agents risk` local_command=`gitclaw agents risk` execution=`risk-audit` gate=`single-assistant-boundary` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`

### Agent Layers
- layer=`policy` store=`.gitclaw/AGENTS.md` source=`repo-reviewed-agent-policy` gate=`context-allowlist` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`specs` store=`.gitclaw/agents/*.md` source=`repo-reviewed-agent-specs` gate=`reviewed-frontmatter` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`runtime` store=`GitHub Actions workflow` source=`issue-comment-runner` gate=`github-actions-only` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`conversation` store=`GitHub issues and comments` source=`canonical-session-boundary` gate=`issue-native-thread` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`tools` store=`agent spec tool names` source=`repo-reviewed-tool-intent` gate=`tool-name-metadata-only` count=`2` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`approval` store=`agent spec requires_approval` source=`repo-reviewed-frontmatter` gate=`routing-side-effect-approval` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`delegation` store=`unsupported in v1` source=`explicit-negative-capability` gate=`disabled-single-assistant-v1` count=`0` raw_bodies_included=`false`

### Catalog Gates
- agent_validation_gate=`ok`
- agent_policy_gate=`repo-reviewed-policy-file`
- agent_spec_gate=`repo-reviewed-specs`
- runtime_gate=`github-actions-only`
- delegation_gate=`disabled-single-assistant-v1`
- profile_gate=`single-repository-profile-only`
- tool_gate=`repo-reviewed-tool-names-only`
- approval_gate=`required-before-routing-or-side-effects`
- raw_body_gate=`hashes-counts-and-metadata-only`
- model_e2e_gate=`required`
